⸻

Next Step → Complete your Peer Review Letter using Assignment 3A.

⸻

✅ Assignment 4A: Rough Draft & Peer Review – Round 2

Module: Week 5 | Revision & Self-Assessment
Due Date: [Insert Date]
Points: 100 pts
Submission Type: File Upload (DOCX or PDF)

⸻

📘 Purpose:

This second round of peer review allows you to apply the feedback you received and improve your draft before the final submission in Week 6. This version should show meaningful revision, not just surface-level edits.

⸻

🛠️ Revision Expectations:
• Strengthen your thesis clarity, paragraph structure, and depth of comparison.
• Address at least three of the higher-order issues from your peer review:
• Clarity of thesis
• Balance of ideas
• Organization and transitions
context: From document: ✅ Assignment 3A: Peer Review Letter – Compare & Contrast Essay — chunk 9 (chunk 9/11)
